findings.title: Starlette multipart DoS (CVE-2024-47874)
findings.description: Starlette buffers multipart form fields with no size limit, allowing memory exhaustion DoS.

findings.title: Starlette UploadFile event-loop blocking (CVE-2025-54121)
findings.description: Large file uploads block asyncio event loop during disk spool rollover.

findings.title: fastapi outdated by 20 minor versions
findings.description: Pulls vulnerable starlette 0.38.x. Missing security patches.

findings.title: uvicorn outdated
findings.description: No known CVEs but behind on bug fixes and hardening.

findings.title: No lock file or hash verification
findings.description: No requirements.lock or --require-hashes. Transitive deps not pinned. Supply-chain risk.
